summary: Created 6-phase plan implementing all 13 code quality improvements from the PR 1 Foundations Logic review. Phases are sequential: (1) formatting/docs cleanup, (2) ListHelpers file move, (3) import trimming, (4) coordinated theorem_flip/app1/app2 + G/H_imp_trans' renames, (5) LeftMono variable reordering + S5 variable standardization, (6) diamond'/iff' abbreviation refactoring. Each phase verified with lake build.
